_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the Connect to Database scenario; mock dispatcher only — do not treat as investigation evidence.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key e3c4d5f6-7a8b-4c9d-8e0f-2a3b4c5d6e7f --state Faulted --output json
or jobs logs f4d5e6a7-8b9c-4d0e-9f1a-3b4c5d6e7f80 --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
